label: Furniture

seo.title: Italian-Style Furniture for Ghana Villa Projects
seo.description: Imported Italian leather sofas and designer dining sets for Accra villa and apartment owners. Sourced through Decoropic's curated factory network.

hero.lead: Five curated soft-furniture pieces — Italian sanded leather, designer Casa Calla, and French-line silhouettes — that have walked into Accra living rooms through Decoropic's containers.

items.title: Italian leather, no markup chain
items.body: We're the factory's direct buyer, you're the project's direct receiver.

items.title: Container-fit dimensions
items.body: All five SKUs verified to fit 40HQ container loading plans for Tema port arrival.

items.title: Project-tested upholstery
items.body: Tropical-climate-grade leather and fabric, vetted against Ghana's coastal humidity.

applications: Villa main living room — Italian Sanded Leather and Casa Calla anchor large open-plan arrangements with sculptural presence.
Family room / second living area — Nappa LWT01 in a 3+2 layout for relaxed daily use away from the formal lounge.
Reception lounge — French Design Couches 12 in a paired arrangement with a console table and gallery lighting.
